sections.value: Some of my projects (still work in progress - click a card to explore):

items.title: Dialect-Aware NLP
items.summary: My PhD project: developing NLP solutions tailored to Kurdish dialectal variation, with the long-term goal of extending the methodology to other dialect-rich language families.

items.title: Dialectal Filtering
items.summary: Matching dialectal markers in large noisy corpora to synthesise novel dialect-specific text corpora for underrepresented Kurdish varieties.

items.title: Kurdish Voices
items.summary: Fine-tuning automatic speech recognition models on Kurdish dialect data to enable dialect-specific ASR solutions for low-resource spoken varieties.

items.title: Kurdish Interpretability
items.summary: Applying mechanistic interpretability methods to language models trained on Kurdish - AI differently, KI mal anders ;)

items.title: Kurdish Linguistic Variations Map
items.summary: An interactive map visualising dialectal diversity across Kurdish varieties, based on the Database of Kurdish Dialects (Matras, 2016).

items.title: Language Ontologies & Varieties Explorer (LOVE)
items.summary: A Feature Analyses Navigation (FUAN) tool for exploring and comparing linguistic features across language varieties and families.

items.title: Multilingual Text As Corpus Repository
items.summary: A DDLitLab-funded student project building text corpora to advance machine translation of low-resource languages.

items.title: Towards a Complete Mapping of Kurdish Dialectology
items.summary: An ongoing effort to create a comprehensive interactive map of Kurdish dialect geography, continua, and mutual intelligibility.

items.title: Analysis of Phonology and Morphology in the Kobani Dialect
items.summary: A computer-aided phonological and morphological analysis of Kobani, a Southern Kurmanji variety spoken in and around Rojava.

items.title: StudyToolkitVid
items.summary: A DDLitLab-funded toolkit for studying human perception of video material, supporting research in audio-visual translation quality.

items.title: Crazy Deck
items.summary: A card game designed and built with Dominik over years of study, with a digital multiplayer version now in the works with Ānrán.

items.title: Wooden Math
items.summary: A hand-carved wooden homework submission from 2018 - because sometimes a PDF just doesn't cut it.
